headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (valuation sensitivity to ESG fund flows and index tracking). — Adani Power's ESG recognition by NSE Sustainability enhances disclosure credibility, supporting investor confidence.
what_matters: Possible P/E premium from ESG index inclusion; no immediate margin or revenue impact.
BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, DJSI, ESRS frameworks triggered; no penalties, but improved compliance standing.
Potential for lower cost of capital and passive ESG fund inflows; bond spreads may tighten modestly.
